enabled_events.name: SessionStart
enabled_events.notes: Inject the repository's skill layout and validation rules when a Codex session starts or resumes.

enabled_events.name: PreToolUse
enabled_events.notes: Block destructive git and shell commands that could wipe local work or the repository.

enabled_events.name: PostToolUse
enabled_events.notes: Add repo-specific reminders after Bash commands that touch skill directories or validation entry points.

enabled_events.name: Stop
enabled_events.notes: Run the shared validation script before the turn ends so Codex catches the same failures as CI.
